description: JWT authentication service with token creation and validation
mermaid_code:
classDiagram
    class AuthService {
        +SECRET_KEY: str
        +ALGORITHM: str
        +expire_minutes: int
        +create_token(user_id: str) str
        +decode_token(token: str) dict
        +verify_token(token: str) bool
    }
    class TokenBlacklist {
        -_tokens: set
        +add(token: str)
        +is_blacklisted(token: str) bool
        +cleanup()
    }
    AuthService --> TokenBlacklist : checks

description: Generic repository pattern with SQLAlchemy ORM
In-process event bus with pub/sub pattern
API Gateway with rate limiting and routing
mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    A[Client Request] --> B[API Gateway]
    B --> C{Rate Limit OK?}
    C -->|No| D[429 Too Many Requests]
    C -->|Yes| E{Authenticated?}
    E -->|No| F[401 Unauthorized]
    E -->|Yes| G[Route to Service]
    G --> H[Service Response]
    H --> B
    B --> A

description: Multi-level cache with Redis and in-memory LRU
mermaid_code:
classDiagram
    class CacheManager {
        -_l1_cache: LRUCache
        -_l2_cache: RedisCache
        +get(key: str)
        +set(key: str, value, ttl: int)
        +delete(key: str)
        +clear_all()
    }
    class LRUCache {
        -_capacity: int
        -_cache: OrderedDict
        +get(key: str)
        +put(key: str, value)
        +evict()
    }
    class RedisCache {
        -_client: Redis
        -_prefix: str
        +get(key: str)
        +set(key: str, value, ttl: int)
        +delete(key: str)
        +flush()
    }
    CacheManager --> LRUCache : L1
    CacheManager --> RedisCache : L2
